findings.title: Log4Shell RCE in log4j-core
findings.description: The container ships log4j-core 2.14.1, vulnerable to remote code execution via JNDI lookups (Log4Shell). Widely exploited in the wild.

findings.title: Backdoor in xz-utils (liblzma)
findings.description: Image contains a compromised xz-utils release with a hidden SSH backdoor. Allows authentication bypass on affected sshd builds.

findings.title: OpenSSL Heartbleed information disclosure
findings.description: openssl 1.0.1f is vulnerable to Heartbleed, leaking process memory (including private keys) to a remote attacker.

findings.title: Outdated requests library with CRLF injection
findings.description: python requests 2.19.1 is affected by a header CRLF injection issue. Lower impact but should be upgraded.
